issues.title: Incorrect table usage

issues.fix: Replace 'json_table' and 'json_table2' with the correct tables from the schema.

issues.title: Implicit join syntax
issues.problem: Using comma-separated tables in the FROM clause is an implicit join, which is less readable.
issues.fix: Use explicit JOIN syntax for better readability.
